ctx.does: Bigger capacitors across the board for burst-heavy moments — alpha strikes, long boosts, panic cell chains.

ctx.does: The all-round default: more output, much higher module integrity, and a meaningful heat cut. Survives a power-plant sniping better than any other blueprint.
ctx.exp: Thermal Spread is the broadly optimal pick for combat power plants — it bleeds heat and pairs perfectly with Overcharged.
ctx.for: Non-combat ships of every kind — explorers, haulers and miners — and any build that values reliability over peak output.

power-plant/PowerPlant_Armoured.effect: Adds raw power output plus heavy integrity and heat reduction — the durable default.
power-plant/PowerPlant_Armoured.title: Armoured

ctx.does: Maximum output to feed power-hungry weapon and shield stacks. Costs integrity and runs hot, so pair with Thermal Spread.
ctx.exp: Thermal Spread is the broadly optimal pick for combat power plants — it bleeds heat and pairs perfectly with Overcharged.
ctx.for: Combat ships that need every megawatt — RES/CZ gunboats, interceptors and shield-heavy brawlers. The go-to combat power plant.

power-plant/PowerPlant_Boosted.effect: Maximises power output to feed hungry loadouts, paid for in integrity and heat.
power-plant/PowerPlant_Boosted.title: Overcharged

ctx.does: Hard cut to heat and thermal signature for silent-running and ambush builds. Lowest output of the three.
ctx.exp: Thermal Spread is the broadly optimal pick for combat power plants — it bleeds heat and pairs perfectly with Overcharged.
ctx.for: Stealth and assassination builds, cold-running explorers, and any ship trying to stay off sensors.

power-plant/PowerPlant_Stealth.effect: Cuts heat and signature hard for stealth and cold-running builds.
power-plant/PowerPlant_Stealth.title: Low Emissions

ctx.does: Cuts power draw and heat per shot for next to no damage loss — lets a ship mount more or bigger weapons within its power budget.
ctx.exp: Phasing Sequence (bypasses some shield) or Scramble Spectrum are the pulse-laser staples.
ctx.for: Power- or heat-limited builds, beam-laser boats, and any fit fighting the distributor.

pulse-laser/Weapon_Efficient.effect: Cuts power and heat per shot for sustained fire with minimal damage loss.
pulse-laser/Weapon_Efficient.title: Efficient

ctx.does: Tightens the weapon for extra range and armour piercing — gets full damage through heavy hulls.

pulse-laser/Weapon_Focused.effect: Tightens the weapon for longer range and armour piercing.

ctx.for: Snipers and stand-off builds, rail/plasma gunboats, and PvE pilots who like to open early.
